finding_results.notes: Replaced list-forward aftermath with embodied panic/retching and then shifted late section from hypothetical scripting to enacted confrontation plus material consequence (house key surrendered).
Converted contingency into observed action the same night: Tom returns drunk, Elsie refuses entry, and Tom throws his house key through the slot, creating an on-page irreversible external change.
Added a sustained emotional exchange and a physically grounded reaction from Elsie (breath lock, cramp, support contact) before returning to social-cover strategy talk.
Tightened confession sequence to avoid successive numeric restatement: one explicit debt total, one hearing/police-risk detail, and one named creditor/pressure channel.
Removed additional stillness shorthand beats and retained the strongest voice-flattening beat as the primary stillness-family construction.
Reduced repeated administrative/control diction in confrontation and close, replacing policy-language loops with embodied conflict and room-level action while preserving stake clarity.

summary: Implemented a structural/craft pass that restores aftermath heat, deepens emotional causality, trims repeated confession exposition, reduces stillness/admin tics, and closes on enacted consequence rather than hypothetical planning.
